PowerShell($process = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5010 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Get-Unique; if \($process\) { Stop-Process -Id $process -Force; Write-Host "Killed process $process"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } else { Write-Host "No process found on port 5010" })
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 24172, 1720 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "SmartWorkz|dotnet"} | Measure-Object)
